Bullet Point 3: SPILL RESISTANT CAP: Easy-to-use pour spout on 16.9 fluid ounce sturdy plastic bottle. The cap is designed to drip when turned upside down, or to poor if squeezed, allowing you to get just the right amount of syrup.
Bullet Point 4: LONG SAFE STORAGE PERIOD: When unopened and kept away from sunlight and high temperatures, these syrups will last for at least 5 years, usually much longer. Under these same conditions, refrigeration is not required after opening unless it is a sugar free syrup.

overall_summary: Mid-tier flavored syrup brand targeting versatile usage across beverages and desserts. catalog_content:
Item Name: THE TRUE ORIGINAL - Boon’s GRASS is the original countertop drying rack that gave a fresh look to countertops everywhere. From bottles to pacifiers, it holds all of your baby accessories as they air dry on the flexible blades that resemble real grass. Water drains into the lower tray, where it’s completely contained. And it’s got a sweet, natural presence, like a meadow full of baby deer. Only smaller. And without the deer.
Bullet Point 1: A TRUE ORIGINAL: Beware of imposters! The original GRASS countertop drying rack is only available from Boon
Bullet Point 2: BYE BYE WATER: Easily holds items upright for drying while excess water collects in bottom tray
Bullet Point 3: EASY TO CLEAN: GRASS is simple to split into two pieces, making it easy to give it a quick wash in warm soapy water
Bullet Point 4: Made without BPA or PVC
Bullet Point 5: DIRECTIONS: Not suitable for dishwasher, microwave or to boil
Value: 1.0
Unit: Count
overall_summary: A functional, eco-friendly baby product positioned as a stylish, multi-use drying rack for infant accessories. The 'natural' aesthetic and flexible blades mimic grass, appealing to parents seeking both practicality and decorative appeal. Material safety (BPA/PVC-free) and ease of cleaning support its mid-range, lifestyle-oriented pricing, though no premium claims are visible. Packaging and brand trust likely drive value perception beyond basic utility.
